name: Amica S.A.
summary: Amica S.A. manufactures and distributes household appliances in Poland and internationally. It operates through Free-Standing Heating Appliances, Built-In Heating Appliances, Other Heating Appliances, Goods, and Other segments. The company provides cookers, ovens, wine coolers, heating drawers, hobs, refrigerators, washing machines, washer dryers, dishwashers, microwave ovens, and hoods. It also offers small kitchen appliances, including kettles, toasters, coffee makers, juicers, blenders and mixers, sandwich makers, and steamers, as well as vacuum cleaners; and imports equipment for the purpose of resale, such as refrigerators, washing machines, microwave ovens, dishwashers, and small appliances. In addition, the company provides spare parts and repair services; space rental and maintenance services; consulting and IT services; marketing, promotional, and commercial services; hospitality and catering services; and real estate management services. Amica S.A. sells its products under the Amica, Gram, Hansa, Sideme, CDA, and Fagor brands. The company was formerly known as Amica Wronki S.A. and changed its name to Amica S.A. in August 2016. Amica S.A. was founded in 1945 and is based in Wronki, Poland.
